About

The story
behind the work

I'm a student member of the Institute of Actuaries of India (IAI), pursuing B.Com (Hons) at The Bhawanipur Education Society College (2025–2029), and a student member of the Institute of Actuaries of India (IAI) — working towards becoming a qualified actuary.

My journey started in August 2021 with a Canva illustration of Old Kolkata — just curiosity and a pen tablet. Five years later, I've shipped 13 products: full-stack web apps, mobile games, AI-generated content, and real-world business solutions built for my family's wholesale business.

I believe in AI-assisted development as a legitimate methodology, not a shortcut. Every project in this portfolio was conceived, prompted, iterated, and deployed through persistent curiosity — not prior coding experience. That's the methodology. That's the differentiator.

The through-line across everything I do: analytical rigor from actuarial science, creative energy from building apps, and a bias toward shipping real things for real people.

LinkedIn Email Me

🎓 Academic Foundation

The Bhawanipur Education Society College · B.Com (Hons) · 2025–2029

Student Member — Institute of Actuaries of India (IAI) · Preparing for CM1 (Actuarial Mathematics) examination · Actuarial Science covers financial mathematics, probability, statistics, and risk modelling.

🤖 AI-Native Builder

Uses generative AI not as a crutch but as a force multiplier. Transparent about AI-assisted methodology — it's the differentiator, not something to hide.

🏢 Real-World Impact

Built a complete e-commerce platform for Varsha Impex — a Kolkata family business dealing in wholesale umbrellas, raincoats, and hosiery.

📊 Analytical Rigour

Financial modeling, multiple decrement tables, profit testing, EPV — actuarial thinking grounds everything built and every product decision made.
